segments.speaker: 讲话人19/20
segments.text: Listen to a campus radio announcement. The due date for submitting photographs to the campus photography contest is today at 3:00p.m.. If you would like to enter but have not yet submitted a photograph, remember to do so today. After all submissions are in selected photography, students will judge the photos and declare a winner. The winner's name and winning fol?will be printed in the campus newspaper, and all photographs entered will be posted on the University website next Wednesday.
